name: Fawad Khan
bio: Fawad Afzal Khan is a Pakistani actor, singer, and model. He is one of the most popular and highest-paid actors in Pakistan. He began his career as a singer with the band Entity Paradigm and later transitioned to acting. He is widely recognized for his roles in Humsafar and Zindagi Gulzar Hai, which became landmark productions in Pakistani television history.

name: Mahira Khan
bio: Mahira Khan is a Pakistani actress and former VJ. She is one of the most popular and highest-paid actresses in Pakistan. She gained widespread recognition through her role in Humsafar opposite Fawad Khan. She later appeared in Bollywood film Raees alongside Shah Rukh Khan.

name: Hamza Ali Abbasi
bio: Hamza Ali Abbasi is a Pakistani actor, director, and television host. He studied film direction from the New York Film Academy. He is widely known for his roles in Pyaray Afzal and Man Mayal. He has a massive fan following across Pakistan and internationally.

name: Sajal Ali
bio: Sajal Ali is a Pakistani actress and model who began her career in 2011. She gained widespread recognition for her performances in Nanhi and O Rangreza. She is considered one of the finest young actresses in Pakistani television and has won numerous awards for her work.

name: Ahad Raza Mir
bio: Ahad Raza Mir is a Pakistani-Canadian actor who gained popularity through his roles in Yakeen Ka Safar and Aangan. Son of veteran actor Asif Raza Mir, he quickly established himself as one of the leading young actors in Pakistani drama industry with his powerful performances.

name: Imran Abbas
bio: Imran Abbas Naqvi is a Pakistani actor and model known for his striking looks and intense performances. He gained fame through Khuda Aur Mohabbat and has worked in both Pakistani and Indian projects. He is one of the most followed Pakistani celebrities on social media.

name: Ali Zafar
bio: Ali Zafar is a Pakistani singer, actor, and painter who achieved massive success in both Pakistan and India. He appeared in several Bollywood blockbusters including Mere Brother Ki Dulhan and Total Siyapaa. He is known for his versatile talent spanning music, acting, and fine arts.

name: Humayun Saeed
bio: Humayun Saeed is a veteran Pakistani actor and producer who has been active in the industry since the 1990s. He appeared in the Netflix series The Crown as Prince Hasnat Khan. He is the founder of Six Sigma Plus entertainment company and has produced numerous hit dramas.

name: Danish Taimoor
bio: Danish Taimoor is a popular Pakistani actor known for his charming personality and versatile acting. He gained fame through Mohabbat Subh Ka Sitara Hai and has starred in numerous hit dramas. He is married to actress Ayeza Khan and is one of the most popular celebrity couples in Pakistan.

name: Ayeza Khan
bio: Ayeza Khan is one of Pakistan's most popular and highest-paid actresses and models. She gained massive popularity through Mere Qatil Mere Dildar and Tum Kon Piya. She has the highest number of followers among Pakistani actresses on social media and is known for her stunning looks and natural acting.

name: Wahaj Ali
bio: Wahaj Ali is a Pakistani actor who rose to fame through his breakthrough role in Dil Na Umeed Toh Nahi. He gained further recognition through Tere Bin which became one of the most-watched Pakistani dramas internationally. He is known for his intense acting style and charming screen presence.

name: Yumna Zaidi
bio: Yumna Zaidi is one of Pakistan's most acclaimed actresses known for her powerful and emotional performances. She gained international recognition through Tere Bin alongside Wahaj Ali. She has won multiple awards for her acting and is celebrated for her ability to portray complex characters with great depth.

name: Bilal Abbas Khan
bio: Bilal Abbas Khan is a talented Pakistani actor who gained recognition through Cheekh and O Rangreza. He is known for his versatile acting skills and has won critical acclaim for his performances in both lead and supporting roles. He is considered one of the most promising young actors in Pakistan.

name: Sarah Khan
bio: Sarah Khan is a Pakistani actress and model known for her natural acting and beautiful screen presence. She gained massive popularity through Sabaat and Raqs-e-Bismil. She is married to singer Falak Shabbir and is one of the most popular celebrity couples in Pakistan's entertainment industry.

name: Imran Ashraf
bio: Imran Ashraf is a Pakistani actor and writer who gained massive recognition through his portrayal of Bhola in Ranjha Ranjha Kardi. He is known for his powerful character roles and has proven his versatility through both comedic and dramatic performances. He also writes scripts for dramas.

name: Iqra Aziz
bio: Iqra Aziz is a young and talented Pakistani actress who gained widespread fame through Suno Chanda and Ranjha Ranjha Kardi. She is known for her natural acting style and bubbly personality. She is married to actor Yasir Hussain and is one of the most popular young actresses in Pakistan.

name: Yasir Hussain
bio: Yasir Hussain is a Pakistani actor, host, and writer known for his quick wit and comedic timing. He hosts various award shows and is known for his bold opinions. He is married to actress Iqra Aziz and has written scripts for several successful Pakistani films and dramas.

name: Saba Qamar
bio: Saba Qamar is a versatile Pakistani actress known for her powerful performances in both drama and film. She appeared in the Bollywood film Hindi Medium alongside Irrfan Khan which received critical acclaim. She has won numerous awards for her diverse roles ranging from comedy to intense drama.

name: Noman Ijaz
bio: Noman Ijaz is a veteran Pakistani actor considered one of the greatest actors in Pakistan's entertainment history. He is known for his powerful character roles and has delivered outstanding performances in dozens of acclaimed dramas over his 30-year career. He is a recipient of the Pride of Performance Award.

name: Marina Khan
bio: Marina Khan is a legendary Pakistani actress and director who is best remembered for her iconic role in Tanhaiyaan. She has been active in the industry for over four decades and has contributed significantly to Pakistani television both as an actress and director. She is considered a pioneer of Pakistani drama.

name: Mikaal Zulfiqar
bio: Mikaal Zulfiqar is a Pakistani actor and model known for his tall, handsome looks and strong screen presence. He has appeared in numerous successful dramas and has established himself as one of the leading actors in Pakistani television. He is also known for his fitness and modeling work.

name: Adnan Siddiqui
bio: Adnan Siddiqui is a senior Pakistani actor and producer who appeared in Hollywood film A Mighty Heart alongside Angelina Jolie. He has been active in the Pakistani drama industry for over 30 years and is known for his polished performances and producer work through Cereal Entertainment.
awards: Lux Style Award Best Supporting Actor 2018

name: Zara Noor Abbas
bio: Zara Noor Abbas is a Pakistani actress and niece of actress Bushra Ansari. She made a powerful debut with Khamoshi and has since appeared in several hit dramas. She is known for her expressive acting and has won critical acclaim for her diverse range of roles in Pakistani television.

name: Ali Rehman Khan
bio: Ali Rehman Khan is a versatile Pakistani actor known for his comedic timing and charming personality. He gained recognition through Hamsafar and has appeared in numerous successful dramas and films. He is one of the most sought-after actors in Pakistan for both drama and commercial projects.
awards: Lux Style Award Best Supporting Actor 2017

name: Hania Amir
bio: Hania Amir is a young Pakistani actress and social media star who gained fame through Titli and Ishqiya. She is known for her cheerful personality and natural acting style. She has one of the largest social media followings among young Pakistani actresses and is considered a Gen-Z icon.

name: Muneeb Butt
bio: Muneeb Butt is a popular Pakistani actor known for his romantic roles in drama serials. He gained fame through Hoor Pari and Koi Chand Rakh. He is married to actress Aiman Zaman and is one of the most popular young actors in Pakistani television known for his charming looks.

name: Aiman Zaman
bio: Aiman Zaman is a young Pakistani actress and social media influencer known for her cute looks and charming personality. She started her career as a child actress and later became famous for her leading roles in dramas. She is married to actor Muneeb Butt.

name: Shahzad Sheikh
bio: Shahzad Sheikh is a Pakistani actor and son of legendary actor Javed Sheikh. He has appeared in numerous hit dramas and is known for his good looks and acting skills. He has carved his own niche in the industry and is recognized as a talented actor in his own right.

name: Javed Sheikh
bio: Javed Sheikh is a legendary Pakistani actor with a career spanning over five decades. He has appeared in both Pakistani and Indian films and is known as one of the most versatile actors in South Asian cinema. He has worked with top Bollywood directors and appeared in numerous hit films.

name: Bushra Ansari
bio: Bushra Ansari is a legendary Pakistani actress, singer, comedian, and writer who has been entertaining audiences for over 50 years. She is known for her iconic show Fifty Fifty and numerous character roles. She is considered one of the greatest entertainers in Pakistani history and recipient of Pride of Performance Award.

name: Nauman Ijaz
bio: Nauman Ijaz is considered one of Pakistan's finest actors with a career spanning over three decades. He is known for his intense and powerful character portrayals in dramas like Dastaan and Sang-e-Mar Mar. He has received the Pride of Performance Award for his outstanding contribution to Pakistani entertainment.

name: Sami Khan
bio: Sami Khan is a senior Pakistani actor known for his powerful performances in dramas like Meri Guriya and Main Agar Bhool Jaoon. He has worked in various genres from romance to intense social dramas. He is respected for his dedication to his craft and his ability to portray complex characters.

name: Affan Waheed
bio: Affan Waheed is a Pakistani actor known for his chocolate boy looks and romantic roles in dramas. He gained recognition through Do Bol and has appeared in numerous successful drama serials on HUM TV and ARY Digital. He is known for his natural acting style and strong screen presence.

name: Asim Azhar
bio: Asim Azhar is a Pakistani singer and actor who became famous at a very young age. He first gained attention through his viral song Jo Tu Na Mila and has since released numerous hit songs. He has also appeared in drama serials and is one of the most popular young celebrities in Pakistan.
awards: Lux Style Award Best Male Singer 2020

name: Haroon Shahid
bio: Haroon Shahid is a Pakistani actor and singer known for his soulful voice and intense acting. He gained recognition through O Rangreza and Raqs-e-Bismil. He is known for choosing meaningful and diverse roles that showcase his acting range and has won critical acclaim for his performances.

name: Gohar Rasheed
bio: Gohar Rasheed is a talented Pakistani actor known for his powerful villainous and character roles. He gained massive recognition through his role in Mann Mayal and Sang-e-Mar Mar. He is known for his intense screen presence and his ability to portray both positive and negative characters with great conviction.

name: Ahsan Khan
bio: Ahsan Khan is a Pakistani-British actor and host who was born in London but raised in Pakistan. He is known for his versatile roles in dramas and is also a popular television host. He gained critical acclaim for his role in Udaari which addressed child abuse and won him numerous awards.

name: Osman Khalid Butt
bio: Osman Khalid Butt is a Pakistani actor and writer known for his witty personality and versatile performances. He gained fame through Dillagi and Ehd-e-Wafa. He is also known for his social media presence and is one of the most followed Pakistani celebrities for his witty comments and opinions.

name: Mawra Hocane
bio: Mawra Hocane is a Pakistani actress and model who appeared in the Bollywood film Sanam Teri Kasam. She is known for her innocent looks and natural acting style. She has appeared in numerous successful Pakistani dramas and has a massive fan following in both Pakistan and India.

name: Urwa Hocane
bio: Urwa Hocane is a Pakistani actress, model, and producer who is the sister of actress Mawra Hocane. She gained recognition through Besharam and Mann Mayal. She is also a producer and has been involved in the production of several successful dramas. She is known for her bold fashion choices.

name: Fahad Mustafa
bio: Fahad Mustafa is one of Pakistan's biggest film stars and television hosts. He is known for hosting the popular game show Jeeto Pakistan and for blockbuster films like Actor In Law and Load Wedding. He is the highest-paid host in Pakistan and one of the most bankable film stars.
awards: Lux Style Award Best Actor Film 2017

name: Sheheryar Munawar
bio: Sheheryar Munawar is a Pakistani actor, producer, and director known for his roles in Ho Mann Jahaan and Project Ghazi. He runs his own production company and is known for choosing diverse and challenging projects. He is considered one of the most talented multi-dimensional personalities in Pakistani entertainment.

name: Yasra Rizvi
bio: Yasra Rizvi is a talented Pakistani actress and writer known for her bold and unconventional roles. She gained recognition through Mein Kya Hoon and Aangan. She is also a playwright and screenwriter and is known for choosing roles that challenge societal norms and address important issues.

name: Farhan Ali Agha
bio: Farhan Ali Agha is a senior Pakistani actor known for his powerful character roles in dramas and films. He is respected for his consistent and dedicated performances and has appeared in numerous successful productions over his 25-year career in Pakistani television and film.
awards: Lux Style Award Best Supporting Actor 2015

name: Shaan Shahid
bio: Shaan Shahid is Pakistan's biggest film action hero and one of the most decorated film actors in Pakistan's history. He has appeared in over 100 films and is known as the King of Pakistani cinema. He starred in the blockbuster Waar and has been a dominant force in Lollywood for over 30 years.

name: Sarwat Gilani
bio: Sarwat Gilani is a Pakistani actress known for her bold roles and powerful performances in dramas like Churails and Firaaq. She is also one of the first Pakistani actresses to openly support LGBTQ+ rights. She appeared in the critically acclaimed web series Churails for Zee5 which received international attention.

name: Kubra Khan
bio: Kubra Khan is a Pakistani-British actress and model known for her stunning looks and powerful acting. She gained recognition through Na Maloom Afraad 2 and Alif. She is known for her diverse roles ranging from action to romantic drama and has won critical acclaim for her performances.

name: Sonya Hussyn
bio: Sonya Hussyn is a Pakistani actress known for her emotional and powerful performances in socially relevant dramas. She gained recognition through Mohabbat Na Kariyo and Mere Bewafa. She is known for her dedication to her craft and her ability to portray characters facing social injustice with great sensitivity.

name: Mohib Mirza
bio: Mohib Mirza is a senior Pakistani actor known for his performances in both drama and film. He is known for the popular sitcom Doraha and has appeared in numerous films. He is also a talented director and has directed several projects for Pakistani television and film industry.

name: Nabeel Zuberi
bio: Nabeel Zuberi is a Pakistani actor known for his charming personality and romantic roles in drama serials. He made his acting debut and quickly gained popularity among drama viewers for his good looks and natural acting. He has appeared in several successful drama serials on major Pakistani channels.

name: Emmad Irfani
bio: Emmad Irfani is a Pakistani actor and model who started his career in modeling and then transitioned to acting. He is known for his role in Angan and various other drama serials. He has established himself as a reliable and talented actor in Pakistani television industry.

name: Ali Ansari
bio: Ali Ansari is a young Pakistani actor who has appeared in several popular drama serials. He is known for his natural acting style and has gained a dedicated fan following through his work in drama serials like Pardes and Prem Gali. He continues to establish himself in the competitive Pakistani drama industry.

name: Dananeer Mobeen
bio: Dananeer Mobeen is a Pakistani actress and content creator who became famous overnight with her viral Pawri Ho Rahi Hai video. She later made her acting debut in Sinf-e-Aahan. She is one of Pakistan's biggest social media stars and has leveraged her online fame into a successful acting career.
awards: Social Media Celebrity of the Year 2021

name: Ghazal Siddiqui
bio: Ghazal Siddiqui is a Pakistani actress known for her work in drama serials. She has appeared in several successful productions and has established herself as a reliable performer in the Pakistani drama industry. She is known for her dedication to her roles and her natural on-screen presence.

name: Asad Siddiqui
bio: Asad Siddiqui is a Pakistani actor known for his charming looks and romantic roles. He is married to actress Zara Noor Abbas and together they are one of Pakistani entertainment's most popular couples. He has appeared in numerous successful dramas and has built a solid reputation in the industry.

name: Sania Saeed
bio: Sania Saeed is one of Pakistan's most respected and versatile actresses with a career spanning over three decades. She is known for her powerful performances in Angan Terha, Dastaan, and Ranjha Ranjha Kardi. She has won numerous awards and is considered a national treasure of Pakistani television.

name: Rabia Butt
bio: Rabia Butt is a Pakistani actress and model known for her stunning looks and strong performances in drama serials. She has appeared in numerous successful dramas and is recognized for her versatility and screen presence in Pakistani television.

name: Saboor Ali

name: Kinza Hashmi

name: Hajra Yamin
bio: Hajra Yamin is a Pakistani actress known for her powerful performances in Ehd-e-Wafa and Dil Na Umeed Toh Nahi. She is praised for her ability to portray emotionally complex characters with depth and sensitivity. She is considered one of the finest actresses of her generation.

name: Sanam Baloch
bio: Sanam Baloch is a popular Pakistani actress and television host known for hosting Samaa TV morning show. She gained acting fame through Dastaan and Jackson Heights. She is one of the most recognized faces on Pakistani television both as an actress and host.

name: Naimal Khawar
bio: Naimal Khawar is a Pakistani actress and painter who gained fame through Anaa. She is married to actor Hamza Ali Abbasi and retired from acting after marriage. She is also a talented visual artist and her paintings have received critical acclaim.

name: Ushna Shah
bio: Ushna Shah is a Pakistani actress known for her bold opinions and powerful performances. She gained recognition through Bashar Momin and Balaa. She is known for her strong screen presence and her willingness to play complex negative characters. She is also very vocal on social media.

name: Nadia Khan
bio: Nadia Khan is a veteran Pakistani actress and host who has been entertaining audiences for decades. She is known for hosting popular morning shows and has appeared in numerous successful drama serials. She is one of the most recognized television personalities in Pakistan.

name: Aiman Zaman

name: Noor Zafar Khan
bio: Noor Zafar Khan is a Pakistani actress who has appeared in several drama serials. She is known for her natural acting and has built a steady career in Pakistani television with consistent performances across various productions.

name: Fazila Qazi

name: Aehsun Talish

name: Shahid Khan

name: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan
bio: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan is a world-renowned Pakistani classical and devotional music singer and nephew of the legendary Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan. He has lent his voice to numerous Bollywood blockbusters and has performed globally. He is one of the most recognized Pakistani artists internationally.

name: Amir Qureshi
bio: Amir Qureshi is a Pakistani actor known for his work in drama serials and films. He has appeared in various successful productions and is recognized for his strong screen presence and dedication to his craft in Pakistani entertainment.

name: Alyy Khan

name: Farhan Saeed
bio: Farhan Saeed is a Pakistani singer and actor known for his soulful voice and acting in Suno Chanda. He was the lead vocalist of the band Jal and has had numerous hit songs. He is married to actress Urwa Hocane and is one of Pakistan's most popular celebrity couples.

name: Agha Ali

name: Azfar Rehman

She is an advocate for social causes and uses her platform to raise awareness about issues like child abuse and domestic violence. She is married to Ali Safina.

name: Shagufta Ejaz

She is particularly praised for her portrayal of strong mother figures and complex supporting characters.

name: Minal Khan
bio: Minal Khan is a young Pakistani actress and twin sister of Aiman Khan. She gained massive popularity through Jalan and Nand. She is one of the most followed Pakistani celebrities on Instagram and is known for her bold roles and fashion sense. She is married to actor Ahsan Mohsin Ikram.

name: Aiman Khan
bio: Aiman Khan is a Pakistani actress and model and twin sister of Minal Khan. She is one of the most followed Pakistani celebrities on Instagram with over 10 million followers. She appeared in Koi Chand Rakh and is married to actor Muneeb Butt. She is known for her stunning looks and fashion.

name: Shehroz Sabzwari
bio: Shehroz Sabzwari is a Pakistani actor and son of veteran actor Behroze Sabzwari. He has appeared in numerous drama serials and is known for his versatile acting. He gained further attention for his personal life and is now married to actress Sadaf Kanwal.

bio: Sadaf Kanwal is a top Pakistani model and actress known for her striking looks and runway presence. She transitioned into acting and appeared in drama serials. She is married to actor Shehroz Sabzwari and is one of the most prominent faces in Pakistani fashion industry.

bio: Sohail Sameer is a Pakistani actor, writer, and director known for his work in both drama and comedy productions. He has been active in the industry for over two decades and is recognized for his contributions both in front of and behind the camera in Pakistani entertainment.

bio: Komal Meer is a young Pakistani actress who gained recognition through Ishq Jalebi and Raaz-e-Ulfat. She is known for her expressive eyes and emotional acting. She has quickly established herself as one of the most promising young talents in Pakistani drama industry.

bio: Usama Khan is a young Pakistani actor who gained recognition through his powerful performances in drama serials. He is known for his intense acting style and has won critical acclaim for roles in Ishq Murshid and various other successful productions. He is considered one of the finest young actors.

name: Dua Malik
bio: Dua Malik is a Pakistani actress, singer, and host known for her vibrant personality and entertaining performances. She is married to comedian Syed Muhammad Yaseen and is known for her work in comedy shows and drama serials. She is also a popular social media personality.

bio: Ali Xeeshan is a renowned Pakistani fashion designer and occasional actor known for his flamboyant personality and extraordinary design aesthetic. He is one of Pakistan's most celebrated fashion designers and has also appeared in entertainment productions with his larger-than-life personality.

name: Meera
bio: Meera is one of Pakistan's biggest film stars who has appeared in over 60 films. She is known for her glamorous image and bold film roles and has appeared in both Pakistani and Indian productions. She is one of the most recognized faces of Lollywood and a legendary figure in Pakistani cinema.

name: Reema Khan
bio: Reema Khan is a legendary Pakistani film actress, director, and producer who is one of the biggest stars of Lollywood. She has appeared in over 100 films and is known as the Queen of Pakistani cinema. She has also directed films and runs her own production company.

name: Resham
bio: Resham is a veteran Pakistani film actress and one of the most iconic stars of Lollywood. She has appeared in numerous blockbuster films and is known for her versatility and strong screen presence. She has received multiple awards throughout her decades-long career in Pakistani cinema.

name: Zeba Bakhtiar
bio: Zeba Bakhtiar is a legendary Pakistani actress best known for the iconic Bollywood film Henna opposite Rishi Kapoor. She has appeared in numerous Pakistani and Indian productions and is one of the few Pakistani actresses to achieve fame in Bollywood. She is considered a timeless beauty.

name: Nargis
bio: Nargis is a popular Pakistani film actress known for her bold roles and comedic performances in Lollywood films. She has appeared in numerous Pakistani films and is known as one of the most entertaining personalities in the Pakistani film industry with a huge fan following.

name: Imran Khan
bio: Imran Khan is a Pakistani actor and model who has appeared in numerous drama serials. He is known for his natural acting style and strong screen presence. He has built a solid reputation in Pakistani television through his consistent performances in drama serials across major channels.

name: Ali Rehman
bio: Ali Rehman is a Pakistani actor known for his charming personality and versatile performances in drama serials. He has appeared in numerous hit dramas and continues to be one of the most sought-after young actors in Pakistani television with a strong and dedicated fan base.

name: Sunita Marshal
bio: Sunita Marshal is a Pakistani Christian actress known for her diverse roles in drama serials. She has appeared in numerous successful productions and is recognized for her versatility and dedication. She is married to actor Wayne Marshall and is known for breaking stereotypes in Pakistani entertainment.
awards: HUM Award Best Supporting Actress Nomination
